input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.3.3.1
            TITLE: the throttle cable or rod must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.3.3.1: The throttle cable or rod must:
IC.3.3.1 The throttle cable or rod must: 
a. Have smooth operation 
b. Have no possibility of binding or sticking 
c. Be minimum 50 mm from any exhaust system component and out of the exhaust stream 
d. Be protected from being bent or kinked by the driver’s foot when it is operated by the 
driver or when the driver enters or exits the vehicle

final_answer: IC.3.3.1 The throttle cable or rod must: a. Have smooth operation b. Have no possibility of binding or sticking c. Be minimum 50 mm from any exhaust system component and out of the exhaust stream d. Be protected from being bent or kinked by the driver’s foot when it is operated by the driver or when the driver enters or exits the vehicle
